features.title: Standard repository harness
features.behavior: A fresh session can initialize the repository, see one current objective, select the next task, route its diff, and verify completion without contradictory owners.
features.user_visible_behavior: Repository work preserves JobSentinel behavior while becoming resumable and verifiable across supported platforms.

features.title: Canonical harness remediation
features.behavior: The repository harness conforms to the installed harness-engineering package except for the exact user-authorized pre-alpha-private-no-ci requirement exception.
features.user_visible_behavior: Repository work is resumable, growth-ready, and locally verifiable while hosted CI remains explicitly absent during private pre-alpha development.

features.title: Full repository ownership refactor
features.behavior: The Rust, Tauri, frontend, test, script, workflow, packaging, and documentation trees match the locked ownership blueprint without obsolete compatibility layers.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel retains its privacy, security, accessibility, and platform behavior while internal ownership becomes explicit.

features.title: Crate DRY remediation
features.behavior: Every confirmed actionable duplication and DRY violation under crates has one canonical owner, obsolete copies are removed, and maintained production and test sensors prevent recurrence.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel preserves its behavior while shared policies, normalization, storage, sources, and document handling remain consistent across the Rust workspace.

features.title: Frontend DRY remediation
features.behavior: Every confirmed actionable duplication under src and src-tauri/src has one canonical owner, obsolete copies are removed, and the maintained frontend production ratchet prevents recurrence.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel preserves its interface and desktop behavior while shared resume, score, dashboard, market, feedback, error, and command-adapter behavior stays consistent.

features.title: Repository residual cleanup
features.behavior: Frontend tests, scripts, plans, harness documents, generated artifacts, dependencies, and policy projections have one current owner with obsolete or duplicate material removed.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel preserves product behavior while the repository becomes smaller, easier to navigate, and harder to regress.

features.title: Repository post-cleanup adversarial review
features.behavior: Maintained source, tests, scripts, manifests, and documentation are independently reviewed for missed correctness, ownership, dependency, duplication, and maintainability work before another major feature begins.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel starts its next feature stream from a verified repository baseline with known maintenance risks made explicit.

features.title: Repository post-cleanup corrections
features.behavior: Confirmed database, notification, documentation, manifest, mock-graph, dead-API, and review-sensor findings are corrected without reopening a broad cleanup stream.
features.user_visible_behavior: Saved alert choices and local data protections behave as described before new major feature work begins.

features.title: Close the v2.9.5 source candidate
features.behavior: The reproducible database failure, saved-alert notification orchestration, dependency drift, and stale release records are corrected before the source candidate is called complete.
features.user_visible_behavior: JobSentinel preserves local data integrity and sends eligible saved alerts while the release candidate accurately describes and verifies what it ships.

features.title: Correct v2.9.5 GUI QA regressions
features.behavior: Release-blocking regressions in resume validation, narrow salary filters, first-run dark contrast, support-report testing, and desktop close-to-tray behavior are corrected and regression-protected.
features.user_visible_behavior: Fresh resume, dashboard, first-run, support, and tray workflows behave correctly at release boundaries.

features.title: Cut the v2.9.5 release
features.behavior: The verified v2.9.5 source candidate is published through the authorized release workflow, and its public artifacts, metadata, and immutable references are validated before v3 work begins.
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can obtain a verified v2.9.5 release whose public artifacts match the tested source candidate.

features.title: Approve the comprehensive v3 execution plan
features.behavior: The v3 strategy package and every unfinished maintained-doc commitment are dispositioned in one ordered, user-approved master plan before implementation begins.
features.user_visible_behavior: The next major investment has explicit privacy, usability, and verification boundaries.

features.title: Reconcile v3 planning truth
features.behavior: Gate 0 records and deterministic plan checks keep release, debt, test, and pipeline claims accurate.
features.user_visible_behavior: V3 starts from one approved plan.

features.title: Freeze the v3 quality baseline
features.behavior: Versioned contracts, synthetic evals, typed-job evidence, deterministic file input, and budgets fail closed.
features.user_visible_behavior: V3 rules freeze before data migration.
verification: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS node scripts/dev/run-cargo.mjs test -p jobsentinel-domain --all-features

features.title: Build the local data foundation
features.behavior: Append-only migrations and typed operations add bounded local v3 records safely.
features.user_visible_behavior: Private payloads stay out of events.

features.title: Build recovery and repair
features.behavior: Recovery, portability, policy, consent, support, and repair paths fail closed and work offline.
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can recover or move local data safely.

features.title: Build source and browser governance
features.behavior: Source actions and browser capture fail closed behind typed policy.
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can control and explain every source action.

features.title: Build local evidence and matching
features.behavior: Local evidence keeps resume and match claims bounded and reproducible.
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can see why a job matches and the evidence behind it.
features.next_trigger: Link citations to local case evidence.
